message:
feat(fcp-core,fcp-host,fwc): introduce NotYetMeasured and Unavailable descriptor status variants

The descriptor status vocabulary previously collapsed several semantically
distinct states into Unverifiable or Failed, which made downstream guidance
dishonest. A connector whose auth state simply hasn't been measured yet is
fundamentally different from one whose auth state is structurally unverifiable,
and a connector that is temporarily unavailable is different from one that has
permanently failed.

Changes across the descriptor system:

- DescriptorStatus: add NotYetMeasured (measurement hasn't run yet) and
  Unavailable (surface exists but is currently unreachable). Reorder severity
  indices to place these new states in their natural position between Unknown
  and the terminal failure states.

- PrerequisiteStatus: mirror the same two new variants so prerequisite
  descriptors can express "not yet checked" vs "check surface unavailable".

- SimulateSupport (admin_state): add NotYetMeasured and Unavailable variants
  so host-advertised simulation capability metadata carries the same
  fine-grained state distinctions.

- ConnectorHealth::Unavailable now maps to DescriptorStatus::Unavailable
  instead of Failed, since unavailability is transient, not terminal.

- AuthDescriptor, PrerequisiteCatalog, ReadinessDescriptor: add
  not_yet_measured() constructors and update from_auth_caps / from_recipe
  to use NotYetMeasured instead of Unverifiable where the state genuinely
  hasn't been measured yet.

- Workspace-manifest discovery (readiness.rs): updated shared_descriptor()
  to use NotYetMeasured for runtime.state, setup.prerequisites, and a new
  auth.active_state check, since workspace discovery cannot actively measure
  these surfaces.

- Updated summaries to say "not been measured yet" instead of "not been
  verified yet" to match the semantic precision of the new status names.

- admin_state.rs: rustfmt formatting cleanup for long lines in format!
  macros, method call chains, and remediation string literals.

- Tests: updated all assertions from Unverifiable to NotYetMeasured where
  appropriate. Added serde round-trip tests for new variants, a test for
  ConnectorHealth::Unavailable mapping, and a comprehensive test that
  shared_descriptor() produces the correct NotYetMeasured checks for
  runtime gaps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
